---
title: "Mises–Hayek–de Finetti Project"
format: gfm
---

This repository supports an interdisciplinary research project. The goal is literature synthesis and collaborative writing.

## Repository organization

The repository is organized as one draft directory plus three topical lanes, with
supporting directories around them.

- `draft/`
  The manuscript-in-progress (`proposal-short.qmd`, `rae_intro.md`) and its bibliography.

- `philosophical/` , `mathematical/` , `computational/`
  Three topical lanes. Each holds a collaborator brief plus prose/notes that develop
  the lane.

- `project_meta/`
  Project-level artifacts (scope, outline, timeline, shared decisions).

- `sources/`
  Bibliography and source notes.

- `working_notes/`
  Exploratory notes, brainstorms, outlines, and fragments. Author folders welcome.

- `appendices/`
  Technical details, extended examples, and background material.

- `archive/`
  Archived or legacy material kept for reference.

See `CONTRIBUTING.md` for guidance on where to place new work and editing norms.

## Legacy structure

Folders related to earlier project templates (e.g. code, data, figures, writing scaffolds)
have been moved to:

`archive/legacy_structure/`

These are retained for reference but are not part of the active workflow.
